summary: Matched `fn_8003F654` in `src/melee/pl/plbonuslib.c` and changed `plbonuslib.c` from `NonMatching` to `Matching` in `configure.py`. The key matching fix was an inline `my_sqrtf` using `__frsqrte` with local double constants, plus removal of unused `MSL/math_ppc.h`, to keep `.sdata2` layout aligned with the target object. The PR body reports `fn_8003F654` at 100.0% and `plbonuslib.c` `.text`, `.data`, and `.sdata2` all at 100.0%.

key_files.role: Matched `fn_8003F654`, added `my_sqrtf`, removed `MSL/math_ppc.h`, and rewrote local/control-flow shape around stale-move table updates.

what_changed: `src/melee/pl/plbonuslib.c` removed the unused `#include <MSL/math_ppc.h>` while keeping `MSL/math.h` and `MetroTRK/intrinsics.h`.

Added a static inline `my_sqrtf(float x)` using `__frsqrte`, local `const double half = 0.5`, local `const double three = 3.0`, three Newton-style refinement steps, a `volatile float y`, and a small local `u8 _[4] = { 0 }`.

Reworked `fn_8003F654` from a mostly direct semantic version into a matching-shaped implementation using locals such as `table`, `entity`, `b34_result`, `teammate_slot`, `avg_sum`, `other_pos`, and `cam_pos`.

`fn_8003F654` now calls helper-style routines visible in the diff, including `pl_Verify_gm_8016AEDC`, `pl_CheckIfSameTeam`, and `pl_CalculateAverage`, instead of open-coding all of the prior boolean/team/average expressions.

The function still updates stale-move table fields such as `xD74`, `xD78`, `xD7C`, `xD80`, `xD84`, `xD88`, `xD8C`, `xD90`, `xD94`, and `xD98`, but with branch, temporary, and averaging forms adjusted for the match.
smart_moves: Used local double constants inside `my_sqrtf` specifically to get the desired codegen without adding extra `.sdata2` local statics, as stated in the PR body.
Removed an otherwise unused math header because even an include-level detail affected generated `.sdata2` layout for the target object.
Avoided relying on plain `sqrtf` and instead introduced a local `__frsqrte`-based helper whose refinement sequence could be shaped to the original compiler output.
Only flipped the translation unit to `Matching` after verification showed `fn_8003F654` and the relevant `plbonuslib.c` sections at 100.0%.
Preserved matching-sensitive expression shape with explicit absolute-value branches, helper calls for average calculation, and a switch/default-return around `ftLib_8008732C(entity)`.
decomp_lessons: For `.sdata2`-sensitive matches, constant placement matters: local constants can be preferable to file-level or header-provided statics if the target object did not emit those extra constants.
Unused includes can still perturb generated data layout; when `.sdata2` is close but not exact, audit math and inline-helper headers as well as source statements.
Matching a mathematically simple operation may require recreating the original compiler idiom, such as `frsqrte` plus repeated refinement, rather than using the cleanest library call.

Do not promote a translation unit in `configure.py` until both code and data sections have been verified; this PR used `python configure.py --require-protos`, `ninja`, and section-level 100.0% checks.
When semantic code is already close, remaining match work may be in temporary variable lifetimes, branch shape, volatile stores, stack padding, and helper selection rather than in game logic.
naming_conventions: Still-unknown functions retain address-style names such as `fn_8003F654` and `fn_8003F53C`.
Known module functions use the `plBonusLib_` prefix, as seen with `plBonusLib_8003D514`.
Player and fighter-library calls preserve existing subsystem prefixes such as `Player_`, `ftLib_`, `ft_`, `gm_`, and `Stage_`.
New/local helper names in this diff use `pl_` prefixes for player-library utilities: `pl_Verify_gm_8016AEDC`, `pl_CheckIfSameTeam`, and `pl_CalculateAverage`.
Unidentified struct fields in `pl_StaleMoveTableExt_t` remain offset-style names like `xD74`, `xD80`, `xD8C`, and `xD98` rather than speculative semantic names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Inline replacement for `sqrtf`: `my_sqrtf` uses `__frsqrte((double) x)` and three repeated `half * guess * (three - guess * guess * x)` refinements.
Local `const double half` and `const double three` were used to avoid extra `.sdata2` local statics.
Removing `MSL/math_ppc.h` was part of the `.sdata2` matching tactic.
The added `volatile float y` and local `u8 _[4] = { 0 }` in `my_sqrtf` are visible stack/codegen-shaping details in the diff.
Control flow was reshaped with `switch (ftLib_8008732C(entity))`, `case 0: break`, and `default: return`.
Explicit absolute-value branches and repeated temporary assignments replaced terser ternary-style expressions to match generated code.
`pl_CalculateAverage` replaced inline division/cast average expressions in the matched version.
review_feedback: No human review comments or formal reviews are present in the provided slice.
The decomp.dev bot reported GALE01 matched code increased by 1108 bytes and linked code increased by 14536 bytes.
The bot reported 2 new matches: `main/melee/pl/plbonuslib` `fn_8003F654` improved from 75.24% to 100.00% for +275 bytes, and `.sdata2` improved from 83.33% to 100.00% for +7 bytes.
The PR body verification listed `python configure.py --require-protos`, `ninja`, `fn_8003F654`: 100.0%, and `plbonuslib.c`: `.text`, `.data`, and `.sdata2` all 100.0%.
follow_up_queries: Find other melee decomp PRs where removing a math header or unused include fixed `.sdata2` layout.
Search for other `sqrtf` or reciprocal-square-root matches that used `__frsqrte` and local double constants.
Audit remaining offset-style fields in `pl_StaleMoveTableExt_t` around `xD74` through `xD98` for future semantic naming.
Look for later PRs that rename `fn_8003F654`, `my_sqrtf`, `pl_CalculateAverage`, or the stale-move table fields.
Search for other translation units flipped from `NonMatching` to `Matching` after final function and data-section cleanup.
